checks.summary: The diff implements the requested unified random LogSampler across request, access, and diagnostic sampling and removes the old first-N LogRateLimiter behavior.

evidence.label: Unified sampler implementation
evidence.detail: src/datasystem/common/log/log_sampler.cpp and log_sampler.h add LogSampler with request/access/diagnostic SampleRate thresholds, random Mix64 hash-threshold decisions, request-trace cached decisions, event sampling, and access sampling entrypoints.

evidence.label: Old limiter replaced
evidence.detail: src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter.cpp and .h are deleted, logging.cpp removes log_rate_limit initialization, and log.h/log_message_impl.cpp now call LogSampler before LOG/PLOG payload construction while preserving FATAL pass-through.

evidence.label: Three-dimensional integration
evidence.detail: access_recorder.cpp gates AccessRecorder construction and lazy field materialization through LogSampler::ShouldRecordAccess; log.h adds ShouldCreatePlogMessage and runtime log checks; worker_service_impl.cpp and share_memory.proto propagate LogSampleConfigPb for request/access/diagnostic ppm to clients.

evidence.label: Configuration and validation
evidence.detail: logging.cpp defines request_sample_rate, access_sample_rate, and diagnostic_sample_rate flags; common_gflags_validate.cpp validates [0.0,1.0]; flags.cpp transactionally updates sampler flags and retains previous-good config on invalid updates.

evidence.label: Coverage added
evidence.detail: tests/ut/common/log/log_sampler_*.cpp, log_access_facade_test.cpp, log_performance_test.cpp, tests/st/common/log/log_sampler_st_test.cpp, and zmq_trace_sampling_meta_test.cpp cover random distribution, disabled/all-1.0 paths, FATAL/PLOG behavior, access sampling, proto propagation, concurrency, and 4000 QPS performance gates.
